codeReview.summary: The implementation correctly addresses all three scoped API bugs: the client scenario diff call now matches the server path-param route, bulk employee create now sends the raw array expected by the server schema, and auth pages now prioritize server `error` messages over `message`. The reviewed diff is focused and includes targeted tests for each bug area.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The implementation-worker procedure requires browser verification for user-facing changes, but this feature changed Login/Register UI error rendering and no `agent-browser` run appears in the transcript skeleton.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/implementation-worker/SKILL.md (Step 5 requires invoking agent-browser for user-visible behavior); worker-transcripts.jsonl entry for session 10085560-86a5-449d-b800-7af8f3ea7884 shows code edits and automated tests only, with no `Tool: Skill {"skill":"agent-browser"}` invocation.

summary: Reviewed fix-api-bugs (commit 9e92348). Code changes are correct and in scope for the three API bug fixes, so status is pass. Noted a shared-state skill-procedure adherence gap: required browser verification was not performed for user-facing auth error messaging changes.
